disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Swelling and stiffness affect many small joints of both hands and both feet fairly evenly, on both sides
trigger_question_examples: Is it one joint or lots of joints, and is it the same on both sides?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's lots of joints - both hands, my knuckles and fingers, my wrists, and the balls of both feet. It's on both sides pretty evenly, not just one spot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Morning stiffness lasting more than three hours before it starts to ease
trigger_question_examples: Is there stiffness in the morning, and how long does it last?
How long does it take in the morning before your joints loosen up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, the mornings are the worst - I'm locked up solid and it takes more than three hours before I can move at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels hot and feverish and very fatigued; the flare came on over about 24 hours after a mild viral illness
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt hot or feverish?
Was there anything before this started, like a cold or infection?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel hot and feverish and totally exhausted. It flared up fast over a day, a few days after a mild cold.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No single joint has become far more swollen, bright red or hot than the others
trigger_question_examples: Is any ONE joint much more swollen, red or hot than the rest?
Is there a single joint that is fiery red or that you can't move or touch at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not one bad joint - it's spread across both hands and both feet fairly evenly. Nothing has turned bright red or gone really hot in just one spot.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I hadn't really thought about singling one out - they all hurt, but no, none of them is fiery red on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No shaking chills or violent shivering, and no measured high temperature
trigger_question_examples: Have you had shaking chills or violent shivering (rigors)?
Have you been able to measure your temperature?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No proper shaking chills or teeth-chattering shivering. We haven't measured a temperature - I just feel hot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known to have the joint condition and takes a regular tablet for it; this is far worse than any previous episode
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing conditions or take regular medicines?
Has this happened before, and is this flare worse than previous ones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis not long ago and take Plaquenil for it, but it's never flared this badly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cannot stand or walk safely and is dependent on the spouse for all movement, with a high risk of falling
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to walk or stand safely at the moment?
Can you manage at home, or do you need someone to help you move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I can't stand or walk on my own - my spouse has to help me with everything and I'm scared of falling.
